questions.question: Explain the primary function of the Domain Name System (DNS) in a distributed system.
questions.hint: Describe the role of DNS in resolving domain names to IP addresses

questions.question: How does a client resolve a hostname to an IP address using the DNS?
questions.hint: Outline the steps involved in the DNS resolution process

questions.question: What is the main difference between a hostname and an IP address in the context of the DNS?
questions.hint: Define and differentiate between hostnames and IP addresses
